breadcrumb: (REFER GAD) GENERAL_NOTES: > Drawing/title block: STUDDED & FINNED TUBES.
text:
GENERAL_NOTES:
1. ALL DIMENSIONS ARE IN MILLIMETERS.
2. CASTABLE GRADE SHALL BE SAME AS THAT OF
END TUBE SHEET REFRACTORY.
3. CASTABLE APPLICATION MUST BE DONE PRIOR TO
THE INSERTION OF TUBE INTO ETS SLEEVES.
4. ALL THE DIMENSIONS PROVIDED ABOVE ARE IN
COLD CONDITION.
5. THIS STANDARD IS APPLICABLE FOR BOTH
STUDDED & FINNED TUBES.
